conflict_name: World War II major urban battles in the Soviet core theater (Moscow, Leningrad, Stalingrad shortlist)
aliases: World War II major urban battles - Russia / Soviet core theater
family_summary: Subnational urban battle and siege episodes on the Eastern Front within the Soviet core theater, focused here on Moscow, Leningrad, and Stalingrad during 1941-09-08 to 1943-02-02.
notes: Bundle constrained to an episode-first shortlist and direct-violent-death DR methodology. Leningrad is split into phases because trapped population and violence composition changed materially.
